aiBriefing.summary: 🔴 SHOPIFY DELISTING RISK: App-audits@shopify.com flagged KwikEngage app for missing pricing info. Apr 20 = demotion, Apr 29 = delisted. Pushkar said 'I will take this forward' but NO reply sent to Shopify yet. SriMandir (₹2Cr/month) P0 escalation — Monday 3PM call with Pranav. CEO flagged AI Calling as urgent. 10 people waiting on you (longest: 9 days). HR goal-setting deadline approaching — 3 direct reports waiting for your input.
highlights: 🔴 SHOPIFY APP DELISTING: KwikEngage app flagged for pricing violation (Rule 4.2.1). Apr 20 demotion, Apr 29 delisting. Pushkar handling but NO reply to Shopify yet. Verify progress TODAY.
🔴 SRIMANDIR P0: ₹2Cr/month merchant threatened to pause + switch to Razorpay. Monday 3PM call with Pranav Merchant. Prep SLA remediation plan.
🔴 AI CALLING: CEO said 'important to get this going ppl.' No confirmed production test. Get Nisheeth/Heli on go-live plan.
🔴 GOALS: Shivam, Mrigank, Anil all waiting 5+ days for your input on annual goals. HR pushing goal completion deadline.
🟡 PEOPLE: 10 people waiting — Rahul Bareja (9d, Netcore connect), Mahima Jain (9d, interview feedback), 3 on goals (5d each).
🟡 FINANCE: 2 Jira approvals (Jade Blue ₹5K, Nathabit FC CN) + TO-66065 pricing recovery (28d stale). Monday revert to Prashant Pandey due.
